2606.03867.title: A Training-Free Mixture-of-Agents Framework for Multi-Document Summarization using LLMs and Knowledge Graphs
2606.03867.paper_summary: Multi-Document Summarization (MDS) plays a critical role in distilling essential information from collections of textual data. Existing approaches often struggle to capture complex inter-document relationships, rely heavily on large amounts of labeled data for supervised training, or exhibit limited generalization across domains and languages. To address these limitations, we present a training-free mixture-of-agents framework for MDS that leverages the complementary strengths of large language models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs. Our approach decomposes summarization into specialized agent tasks: extractive selection, knowledge-aware abstraction, and iterative refinement, each operating without task-specific fine-tuning. We unify their outputs using a multi-perspective consistency mechanism guided by LLMs. Experiments across four datasets in English and Vietnamese demonstrate state-of-the-art or competitive performance, validating the effectiveness and adaptability of our modular design.
2606.03867.paper_summary_zh: 多文件摘要（MDS）在從文本數據集合中提煉關鍵信息方面扮演著重要角色。現有的方法往往難以捕捉複雜的文檔間關係，過度依賴大量標記數據進行監督訓練，或在不同領域和語言之間的泛化能力有限。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一種無需訓練的混合代理框架，用於MDS，利用大型語言模型（LLMs）和知識圖譜的互補優勢。我們的方法將摘要分解為專門的代理任務：抽取選擇、知識感知抽象和迭代精煉，每個任務均不進行特定任務的微調。我們使用由LLMs引導的多角度一致性機制統一它們的輸出。在英語和越南語的四個數據集上的實驗顯示出最先進或具競爭力的性能，驗證了我們模塊化設計的有效性和適應性。
2606.03867.author: Cuong Vuong Tuan et.al.
2606.03867.authors: Cuong Vuong Tuan, Trang Mai Xuan, Tien-Cuong Nguyen, Vu-Duc Ngo, Thien Van Luong
